title: Resolution Urging New York State Support for NY For All Act
summary: Council member introduces resolution urging NY State Senate, Assembly, and Governor to support the New York For All Act. Seeks co-sponsors from fellow councilors; no immediate co-signers at this session.
raw_content:
[00:06:16] >> Thank you, Madam President. I have item
[00:06:18] 11. It is a resolution
[00:06:21] um urging the state of New York both was
[00:06:24] uh the Senate and assembly and the
[00:06:27] governor to support um New York
[00:06:33] um New York for all act. Um, so I
[00:06:37] wondering if is anybody willing to sign
[00:06:39] on with this or
[00:06:41] >> nobody on [clears throat and cough]
[00:06:45] >> something.
[00:06:47] That's something different. [laughter]
[00:06:50] >> We're all
[00:06:52] >> Thank you, Council M. Um, councelor Erin
[00:06:56] Rick.

political_signal.description: Council member advocates for state-level immigrant protection legislation

processing_notes: Presenter identified as Dr. Chol Majok from 'Council mach' transcript reference
NY For All Act = state-level legislation, no city department involvement
Segment 3 of 19 from Common Council Study Session, January 21st 2026
